task_completion.description: Patient's last name is corrected to 'Vasquez' and address is updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMRS patient header or demographics section, the patient's name should appear as 'Elena Vasquez' and the address should be '2847 Maple Grove Lane, Portland, Oregon, 97205'.

task_completion.description: A Facility Visit is started and vitals are recorded accurately.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An active visit should be visible, and the vitals section should display BP 158/94, Weight 87.3 kg, Height 165 cm, Temp 36.8°C, Pulse 82, and SpO2 96%.

task_completion.description: A new severe allergy to Morphine with an Anaphylaxis reaction is documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Allergies list should show 'Morphine' with severity 'Severe' and reaction 'Anaphylaxis'.

task_completion.description: The contraindicated opioid medication (Codeine) is discontinued.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Medications or Orders section, 'Codeine' should be marked as discontinued, stopped, or past (no longer active).

task_completion.description: Acetaminophen 500mg oral twice daily is prescribed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Medications or Orders section, there should be a new active prescription for 'Acetaminophen' with the dosage '500mg' and frequency 'twice daily' (or BID).

task_completion.description: Hemoglobin A1c and Serum Creatinine lab tests are ordered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Orders or Lab section, there should be active orders for 'Serum Creatinine' and 'Hemoglobin A1c' (or 'Glycosylated hemoglobin' / 'A1c').

task_completion.description: A follow-up appointment is scheduled within 14 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Appointments section should show an upcoming scheduled appointment with a date within 14 days of the current system date.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenMRS web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenMRS web application in a browser, not terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: Data was entered into the actual OpenMRS forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing into the correct input fields, dropdowns, and forms within the OpenMRS UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of SQL clients, terminal scripts, or developer tools being used to alter the database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient initial name: Elena Vasques. Target name: Elena Vasquez. Target address: 2847 Maple Grove Lane, Portland, Oregon, 97205. Vitals to record: BP 158/94, Wt 87.3 kg, Ht 165 cm, Temp 36.8 C, Pulse 82, SpO2 96%. Allergy to add: Morphine (Severe, Anaphylaxis). Medication to discontinue: Codeine (the only active opioid). Medication to prescribe: Acetaminophen 500mg oral twice daily. Labs to order: Hemoglobin A1c (may appear as Glycosylated hemoglobin) and Serum Creatinine. Appointment: Must be scheduled within 14 days.
